description: Candidate Area Server room-pattern research notes. Entries are intentionally scan/report oriented and should be treated as hypotheses until verified against more samples.

candidate_notes.name: room number/order
candidate_notes.notes: Possible room index or traversal/order field.

candidate_notes.name: room coordinates/rotation
candidate_notes.notes: Possible room placement and orientation fields.

candidate_notes.name: possible portals/gimmick count
candidate_notes.notes: Possible count or related fields for portals and gimmicks associated with a room.

candidate_notes.name: gimmick count/type/coordinates/rotation/attribute field
candidate_notes.notes: Possible per-gimmick structure containing count, type, position, rotation, and an attribute or flags field.

candidate_notes.name: enemy type/amount
candidate_notes.notes: Possible enemy identifier and spawn/count fields.

candidate_notes.name: chest item ID
candidate_notes.notes: Possible item ID stored for chest rewards.
